heroSection.head: Hi, I'm Lahoucine El Khattaby – Full Stack Developer
heroSection.text: Specializing in MERN Stack, WordPress, Laravel (PHP), and Python

Introduction.Brief: I'm Lahoucine, a passionate Full Stack Developer specializing in the MERN stack, WordPress, and Laravel (PHP). With a solid foundation in frontend technologies like HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and Tailwind, and proficiency in JavaScript, Python, C, and PHP, I excel in creating dynamic and responsive web applications. My expertise extends to database management with MySQL, SQLite, and MongoDB, and I'm well-versed in Agile methodology and Git/GitHub for efficient project management. Additionally, I have a keen eye for design, utilizing tools like Adobe Photoshop and Adobe XD. As a freelancer, I strive to deliver high-quality solutions that meet client needs and exceed expectations.
